title: Appliances, Functions, Storage, and Cloud Connectivity · Protocol Clinic: Net Cdn Vpn Qos Ttl
summary: Design service paths across physical and virtual devices, private cloud networks, public services, and storage. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net cdn vpn qos ttl increment in a labeled hybrid-service path. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain CDN, VPN, QoS, and TTL functions and how each changes delivery, privacy, priority, or loop lifetime.
Compare NAS and SAN access models, protocols, traffic patterns, redundancy, and use cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
